summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TARIC AI bug fixes for Iteration 8. All 3 reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Image classification now works with real images (zapatilla, reloj, auriculares), 2) Clarification questions appear BEFORE classification with new /api/taric/check-clarification endpoint, 3) Market study for aceite de oliva España->Colombia generates complete PESTEL analysis.

minor.issue: Occasional JSON parsing error from AI response (intermittent, passes on retry)

passed_tests: Vague descriptions (camisas, zapatos, aceite, cable) trigger clarification questions
Clarification questions have options array with 2+ items
/api/image/analyze works with zapatilla image from Unsplash
/api/image/analyze works with reloj image from Unsplash
/api/image/analyze works with auriculares image from Unsplash
/api/market/study generates PESTEL for aceite de oliva ES->CO
Frontend clarification panel shows questions with options
Frontend country selector search bar filters countries correctly
Frontend image classifier section is visible with upload button

features_verified.image_classification_bug_fix: WORKING - /api/image/analyze successfully processes real images from Unsplash URLs (zapatilla, reloj, auriculares) and returns product_description with components
features_verified.clarification_before_classification_bug_: WORKING - New endpoint /api/taric/check-clarification asks questions BEFORE full classification. Frontend shows questions panel with options, progress indicator (1/3, 2/3...), Skip button, and Next button
features_verified.market_study_aceite_oliva_bug_fix: WORKING - /api/market/study generates complete study with executive_summary, PESTEL (political, economic, social, technological, environmental, legal), market_size, competitors, trends, opportunities, threats, recommendations
features_verified.country_selector_search: WORKING - CountrySearchSelect component has search bar that filters countries by name/code

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for iteration 8 fully verified: 1) Image classification with real images (Unsplash URLs) works - use ?w=400&h=400&fit=crop for smaller downloads, 2) New /api/taric/check-clarification endpoint checks if description needs clarification BEFORE classification - frontend shows questions with options and progress bar, 3) Market study for aceite de oliva ES->CO generates full PESTEL analysis (may have occasional JSON parse errors from AI but works on retry). Country selector has working search bar. All backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration8.py

rca_of_issues.image_classification_original_issue: The original error was likely due to base64 encoding issues or image validation. The fix added better logging, proper base64 extraction from data URL prefix, and improved error handling in /app/backend/server.py lines 1005-1150
rca_of_issues.clarification_flow_original_issue: Clarification questions were being generated IN the /api/taric/search response, after classification. The fix created a new endpoint /api/taric/check-clarification (line 632) that pre-checks descriptions and returns questions BEFORE full classification. Frontend handleSearch() in DashboardPage.jsx (line 164) now calls check-clarification first
rca_of_issues.market_study_original_issue: The market study timeout was too short. The fix increased timeout in MarketStudyPanel.jsx to 2 minutes (120000ms) and added AbortController for proper timeout handling
